ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "event" TEXT /* Name of the event or match */,
  "match_day" INTEGER /* Match day number in the tournament */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the match is held */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Scheduled start time of the match */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Scheduled end time of the match */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the match */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Temperature during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the venue */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the venue */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group the team is assigned to in the tournament */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_group FOREIGN KEY ("group") REFERENCES group_stages ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_teams" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team participating in the match */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the team in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tournament */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the tournament is held */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_stages" (
  "group_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament this group belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the official is assigned to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., referee, assistant referee) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the official */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_officials_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which the statistics were recorded */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permissions and access associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user has */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who suffered the injury */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which the injury occurred */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, fracture) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspensions" (
  "suspension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspension */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was suspended */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which the suspension occurred */,
  "suspension_date" TEXT /* Date the suspension took effect */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the suspension */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suspensions_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suspensions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the video is associated with */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of video (e.g., highlight, analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_videos_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the photo is associated with */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "photo_caption" TEXT /* Caption for the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_photos_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
